items.title: Classroom
items.description: A classroom is a designated space within a school or educational institution where students gather to receive instruction from a teacher.

items.title: Scissors
items.description: A handheld tool with two sharp blades used for cutting paper, fabric, and other thin materials. Essential for everyday tasks at home, school, or the office.

items.title: Bookself
items.description: A bookshelf is a piece of furniture with horizontal shelves, used to store books and other items.

items.title: Notebook
items.description: A notebook is a portable collection of blank or lined pages bound together, used for writing, note-taking, journaling.

items.title: Pencil
items.description: A pencil is a common writing instrument made of a thin graphite core encased in wood or plastic

items.title: Calipers
items.description: Calipers are precision measuring tools used to determine the distance between two opposite sides of an object.

items.title: Calligraphy ink
items.description: Calligraphy ink is a specialized liquid pigment used for the art of beautiful handwriting and decorative lettering, often applied with dip pens or brushes.

items.title: Acrylic Paint Set
items.description: Perfect for beginners and experienced artists alike, this kit encourages creativity and relaxation through art.

items.title: Sharpener
items.description: A sharpener is a small tool used to restore the fine edge of pencils or other writing instruments, making them suitable for precise writing or drawing.

items.title: Search Magnifier
items.description: A search magnifier is a common interface symbol representing the search function, typically depicted as a magnifying glass icon.

items.title: Lab
items.description: A lab is a specialized facility equipped for scientific research, experiments, and analysis, often used in the fields of space.

items.title: Pen
items.description: A pen is a common writing instrument used to apply ink to a surface, usually paper, for writing or drawingy.

items.title: Mushroom
items.description: A kit that allows you to grow a variety of gourmet mushrooms at home, perfect for food enthusiasts and home cooks seeking fresh, unique ingredients.

items.title: Orchid
items.description: A delicate and exotic flowering plant known for its vibrant colors and intricate blooms, often found in tropical regions and prized for its beauty in gardens and floral arrangements.

items.title: CloudBerry
items.description: Cloudberry is a rare, golden-orange fruit found in cool, northern regions. It grows in boggy, wild landscapes and is prized for its sweet-tart flavor and high vitamin content.

items.title: Sunflower
items.description: A tall, bright yellow flowering plant known for its large, round blooms that follow the sun. Sunflowers are commonly found in fields and gardens, symbolizing warmth and positivity.

items.title: Flamboyant
items.description: The Flamboyant, also known as the Royal Poinciana, is a striking tropical tree renowned for its vivid red-orange blossoms and wide, umbrella-like canopy.

items.title: Lettuce
items.description: A leafy green vegetable commonly used in salads, sandwiches, and wraps. Lettuce is known for its crisp texture and mild flavor.

items.title: Watermelon
items.description: A large, juicy fruit with a green rind and sweet, red flesh, commonly enjoyed fresh in summer or used in beverages and desserts.

items.title: Broccoli
items.description: Broccoli is a green, edible vegetable from the cabbage family, known for its tree-like florets and high nutritional value.s.

items.title: Wild Berry
items.description: A wild berry is a small, edible fruit that grows naturally in forests, fields, and other outdoor environments.

items.title: Lemon
items.description: A lemon is a bright yellow citrus fruit known for its tart, tangy flavor and high vitamin C content.

items.title: VietNam
items.description: Vietnam is a Southeast Asian country known for its rich history, diverse culture, and scenic landscapes ranging from mountains to coastlines.

items.title: Ethiopia
items.description: Ethiopia is a landlocked country located in the Horn of Africa. Known for its rich history as one of the oldest nations in the world.

items.title: Pakistan
items.description: Pakistan is a country in South Asia, known for its diverse landscapes, rich history, and cultural heritage.

items.title: Peru
items.description: Peru is a country in western South America, known for its rich cultural heritage, the Andes mountains, and the ancient Incan city of Machu Picchu

items.title: Bhutan
items.description: Bhutan is a small, landlocked country in the Eastern Himalayas, known for its stunning mountain landscapes, rich Buddhist culture.

items.title: Saudi Arabia
items.description: Saudi Arabia is a country located on the Arabian Peninsula in Western Asia. It is known for its vast deserts, rich oil reserves.

items.title: Ghana
items.description: Ghana is a country located along the Gulf of Guinea and the Atlantic Ocean, in West Africa. Known for its diverse wildlife, rich history, and vibrant culture.

items.title: Honduras
items.description: Honduras is a country in Central America known for its rich cultural heritage, diverse landscapes, and ancient Mayan ruins. It features tropical rainforests, beautiful beaches, and vibrant cities.

items.title: Great Pyrenees
items.description: The Great Pyrenees is a large, majestic dog breed known for its thick white coat and gentle temperament.

items.title: Elephant
items.description: The elephant is the largest land animal on Earth, known for its intelligence, strong social bonds, and distinctive trunk.

items.title: Otter
items.description: A small, playful aquatic mammal known for its sleek fur, webbed feet, and habit of sliding on mud or snow.

items.title: Triceratops
items.description: Triceratops was a large, herbivorous dinosaur known for its three facial horns and large bony frill.

items.title: Rhinoceros
items.description: A large, thick-skinned herbivorous mammal native to Africa and Asia, known for its distinctive horn(s) on the snout.

items.title: Fennec Fox
items.description: The Fennec Fox is a small nocturnal fox native to the Sahara Desert and other parts of North Africa

items.title: Panda
items.description: A panda or a giant panda is a large animal rather like a bear, which has black and white fur and lives in the bamboo forests of China.

items.title: Irrawaddy Dolphin
items.description: The Irrawaddy Dolphin is a freshwater and coastal dolphin species native to Southeast Asia, known for its rounded forehead and unique appearance.

items.title: Crocodiles
items.description: Crocodiles are known for their powerful jaws, armored skin, and stealthy hunting abilities in rivers and wetlands.

items.title: Orangutan
items.description: The orangutan is a large, intelligent primate native to the rainforests of Borneo and Sumatra.

items.title: Chicken
items.description: The domestic chicken is a common farm bird kept worldwide for its eggs and meat.

items.title: Saiga Antelope
items.description: The Saiga Antelope is a critically endangered antelope native to the steppes of Central Asia, known for its distinctive bulbous nose that helps filter dust and regulate temperature.
